<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? One or two sentences. -->

<!-- How would you like it to work? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried other approaches? What are the tradeoffs? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else — screenshots, related issues, links to similar tools. -->
